---
title: "Long Paths and 8.3 Filename Troubleshooting"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("03-define-functions-to-read-in-short-8-3-filenames.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 3: long-path troubleshooting and design notes")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The prose above is rendered from the legacy comments, with comment markers removed. The code below shows the current production helper implementation in `R/io/read_long_paths.R`, so the long explanation can live in `analysis/` rather than as lengthy inline comments in production code.")
```

## Current helper implementation

```{r long-path-functions, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_source_file("R/io/read_long_paths.R", language = "r")
```
